title: NeqSim Skill Manifest
description: Canonical schema for the YAML frontmatter of a SKILL.md across the NeqSim community and enterprise skill catalogs. This is the single source of truth; the community and enterprise skill repositories vendor a byte-identical copy under their own schemas/ folder and validate against it in CI. Keep the vendored copies byte-for-byte identical to this file (checked by devtools/verify_agent_schema_sync.py in the core repo). The description must additionally contain a 'USE WHEN:' trigger clause (enforced by the validator, case-insensitive).

name.description: Canonical skill id. Community/core skills use the neqsim- namespace; internal skills use the enterprise- namespace.

description.description: Short description that MUST contain a 'USE WHEN:' clause so agents can decide when to load the skill.

last_verified.description: ISO date the skill was last verified. Required by the community skill standard; enterprise skills may omit it.

required_skills.description: Skills this skill builds on (e.g. an enterprise overlay extending a community neqsim- skill).

requires.description: Runtime requirements bundle used by community skills (informational; sub-fields such as python_packages/java_packages/env/network are not type-constrained because some skills use a boolean flag).
